subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath turned toward the Lord of the worlds, when He appeared through His Most Great Name, that he may drink of the wine of immortality from the chalice [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اقبل الی مولی العالم اذ ظهر باسمه الاعظم لیشرب رحیق الحیوان من قدح
subcodes.subjects: @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @personal instructions
